publishedAbstract: ODF upgrade on IBM Z results in CephCluster CR with the message ```failed to unmarshal status response: json``` ``` $ oc get cephcluster-o yaml | grep message-A2 message: 'failed to unmarshal status response: json: cannot unmarshal number 10997917846272475136 into Go struct field.fsmap.by_rank.gid of type int' severity: Urgent health: HEALTH_ERR ```
publishedTitle: Error "failed to unmarshal status response" when upgrading ODF on IBM Z Platforms
